query:
SELECT externalId, planName, serviceType, provider, monthlyCost, monthlyRevenue,
  CASE WHEN monthlyCost > 0 THEN ROUND((monthlyRevenue - monthlyCost) / monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END as marginPct
FROM services 
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0087'
ORDER BY serviceType, planName;

-- Also verify billing items are correct now
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId FROM billing_items WHERE contactName LIKE '%Emergency%' ORDER BY id;
